language.name: English
crystal.label: Augment Crystal
crystal.cannotEquip: This item cannot accept augment crystals.
crystal.cannotEquipRank: Rank "%s" requires item enhancement bonus of at least +%d.
crystal.cannotEquipMissingSpellPrereq: The crafter's spell requirements are not met: %s.
crystal.cannotEquipArmorType: This crystal only functions when attached to: %s.
crystal.effect.swim-check: Removes armor check penalty on Swim checks.
crystal.effect.swim-speed: Grants a swim speed equal to half land speed (rounded down to next 5 ft.).
crystal.effect.underwater-freedom: No penalties on attacks or movement while underwater (as if under freedom of movement).
crystal.effect.water-breathing: Breathe water as easily as air.
crystal.effect.deflect-arrows: Deflect one ranged attack per round (as if with the Deflect Arrows feat).
crystal.effect.damage-reduction: Grants damage reduction %{amount}/%{bypass}. Daily cap: %{cap} points.
crystal.effect.competence-bonus-on-saves: Grants +%{bonus} competence bonus on saving throws against %{vs}.
crystal.effect.competence-bonus-on-grapp: Grants +%{bonus} competence bonus on opposed grapple checks to prevent being grappled.
crystal.effect.save-reroll: You may reroll one failed save against the listed effects once per day (immediate mental action).
crystal.effect.morale-bonus: Grants +%{bonus} morale bonus on weapon damage rolls and saves against fear.
crystal.effect.gaze-protection: You may avert your eyes from a creature with a gaze attack without suffering a miss chance on your attack rolls against it.
crystal.effect.extraplanar-trait-protect: You are protected from the listed extraplanar traits: %{covers}.
crystal.effect.touch-attack-penalty-vs-i: Imposes a %{amount} penalty on touch attacks against you by incorporeal creatures.
ui.crystalEquipPrompt: Drag an augment crystal from the compendium into the socket.
chat.crystalSaveReroll.granted: [[name]] lets you reroll a save against [[effect]] (1×/day).
chat.crystalActivation.greaterUsed: The greater crystal glows; its daily power activates.
ocr.placeholder.sparkling: a bright crystal that sparkles in the light
ocr.placeholder.rainbow: a multifaceted crystal whose surface shimmers with rainbow hues
ocr.placeholder.pulsingRed: a dull red crystal that pulses in time with your heartbeat
ocr.placeholder.rubyTorus: a ruby cut into a beveled torus
ocr.placeholder.silverPlate: a small crystal affixed to a polished silver plate

crystals._doc: Per-catalog-id display strings (name, description, unidentified) keyed by crystal catalogId.

adamant-armor-least-armor.name: Crystal of Adamant Armor (Least)
adamant-armor-least-armor.description: This clasp holds a small diamond orb with a sphere of steel at its center. A crystal of adamant armor strengthens your armor or shield against damage.
adamant-armor-least-armor.unidentified: A steel-clad diamond orb; the metal is finer than the clasp around it.

adamant-armor-least-shield.name: Crystal of Adamant Armor (Least)
adamant-armor-least-shield.description: This clasp holds a small diamond orb with a sphere of steel at its center. A crystal of adamant armor strengthens your armor or shield against damage.
adamant-armor-least-shield.unidentified: A steel-clad diamond orb; the metal is finer than the clasp around it.

adamant-armor-lesser-armor.name: Crystal of Adamant Armor (Lesser)
adamant-armor-lesser-armor.description: This clasp holds a small diamond orb with a sphere of steel at its center. A crystal of adamant armor strengthens your armor or shield against damage.
adamant-armor-lesser-armor.unidentified: A steel-clad diamond orb; the metal is finer than the clasp around it.

adamant-armor-lesser-shield.name: Crystal of Adamant Armor (Lesser)
adamant-armor-lesser-shield.description: This clasp holds a small diamond orb with a sphere of steel at its center. A crystal of adamant armor strengthens your armor or shield against damage.
adamant-armor-lesser-shield.unidentified: A steel-clad diamond orb; the metal is finer than the clasp around it.

adamant-armor-greater-armor.name: Crystal of Adamant Armor (Greater)
adamant-armor-greater-armor.description: This clasp holds a small diamond orb with a sphere of steel at its center. A crystal of adamant armor strengthens your armor or shield against damage.
adamant-armor-greater-armor.unidentified: A steel-clad diamond orb; the metal is finer than the clasp around it.

adamant-armor-greater-shield.name: Crystal of Adamant Armor (Greater)
adamant-armor-greater-shield.description: This clasp holds a small diamond orb with a sphere of steel at its center. A crystal of adamant armor strengthens your armor or shield against damage.
adamant-armor-greater-shield.unidentified: A steel-clad diamond orb; the metal is finer than the clasp around it.

clasp-energy-acid-greater.name: Clasp of Acid Protection
clasp-energy-acid-greater.description: This hazy green crystal hisses faintly when exposed to the open air. As a greater crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 15 against acid. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 75 points of acid damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-acid-greater.unidentified: A hazy shard of dark green stone.

clasp-energy-acid-least.name: Clasp of Acid Protection
clasp-energy-acid-least.description: This hazy green crystal hisses faintly when exposed to the open air. As a least crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 5 against acid. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 25 points of acid damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-acid-least.unidentified: A hazy shard of dark green stone.

clasp-energy-acid-lesser.name: Clasp of Acid Protection
clasp-energy-acid-lesser.description: This hazy green crystal hisses faintly when exposed to the open air. As a lesser crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 10 against acid. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 50 points of acid damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-acid-lesser.unidentified: A hazy shard of dark green stone.

clasp-energy-cold-greater.name: Clasp of Cold Protection
clasp-energy-cold-greater.description: This icy clear crystal is covered in a thin layer of frost. As a greater crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 15 against cold. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 75 points of cold damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-cold-greater.unidentified: A frost-rimmed crystal of clear hue.

clasp-energy-cold-least.name: Clasp of Cold Protection
clasp-energy-cold-least.description: This icy clear crystal is covered in a thin layer of frost. As a least crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 5 against cold. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 25 points of cold damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-cold-least.unidentified: A frost-rimmed crystals of clear hue.

clasp-energy-cold-lesser.name: Clasp of Cold Protection
clasp-energy-cold-lesser.description: This icy clear crystal is covered in a thin layer of frost. As a lesser crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 10 against cold. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 50 points of cold damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-cold-lesser.unidentified: A frost-rimmed crystal of clear hue.

clasp-energy-electricity-greater.name: Clasp of Electricity Protection
clasp-energy-electricity-greater.description: This brilliant blue-white crystal crackles with static discharge when touched. As a greater crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 15 against electricity. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 75 points of electricity damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-electricity-greater.unidentified: A flashing, brilliant blue-white gem that flickers with pale light.

clasp-energy-electricity-least.name: Clasp of Electricity Protection
clasp-energy-electricity-least.description: This brilliant blue-white crystal crackles with static discharge when touched. As a least crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 5 against electricity. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 25 points of electricity damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-electricity-least.unidentified: A flashing, brilliant blue-white gem that flickers with pale light.

clasp-energy-electricity-lesser.name: Clasp of Electricity Protection
clasp-energy-electricity-lesser.description: This brilliant blue-white crystal crackles with static discharge when touched. As a lesser crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 10 against electricity. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 50 points of electricity damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-electricity-lesser.unidentified: A flashing, brilliant blue-white gem that flickers with pale light.

clasp-energy-fire-greater.name: Clasp of Fire Protection
clasp-energy-fire-greater.description: This fiery red crystal is slightly warm to the touch. As a greater crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 15 against fire. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 75 points of fire damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-fire-greater.unidentified: A faintly warm red gemstone of unusual color.

clasp-energy-fire-least.name: Clasp of Fire Protection
clasp-energy-fire-least.description: This fiery red crystal is slightly warm to the touch. As a least crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 5 against fire. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 25 points of fire damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-fire-least.unidentified: A faintly warm red gemstone of unusual color.

clasp-energy-fire-lesser.name: Clasp of Fire Protection
clasp-energy-fire-lesser.description: This fiery red crystal is slightly warm to the touch. As a lesser crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 10 against fire. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 50 points of fire damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-fire-lesser.unidentified: A faintly warm red gemstone of unusual color.

clasp-energy-sonic-greater.name: Clasp of Sonic Protection
clasp-energy-sonic-greater.description: This deep purple crystal gives off a faint hum, and rings with a sonorous chime when tapped. As a greater crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 15 against sonic. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 75 points of sonic damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-sonic-greater.unidentified: A faintly humming purple stone that occasionally chimes softly.

clasp-energy-sonic-least.name: Clasp of Sonic Protection
clasp-energy-sonic-least.description: This deep purple crystal gives off a faint hum, and rings with a sonorous chime when tapped. As a least crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 5 against sonic. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 25 points of sonic damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-sonic-least.unidentified: A faintly humming purple stone that occasionally chimes softly.

clasp-energy-sonic-lesser.name: Clasp of Sonic Protection
clasp-energy-sonic-lesser.description: This deep purple crystal gives off a faint hum, and rings with a sonorous chime when tapped. As a lesser crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 10 against sonic. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 50 points of sonic damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
clasp-energy-sonic-lesser.unidentified: A faintly humming purple stone that occasionally chimes softly.

crystal-of-adaptation-least-armor.name: Crystal of Adaptation (Least)
crystal-of-adaptation-least-armor.description: This bright green, circular crystal is pleasantly warm to the touch. A crystal of adaptation protects you from hostile environments, both terrestrial and extraplanar. As an augment crystal slotted into armor, it layers spell-like protection whose power grows with the crystal's rank.
crystal-of-adaptation-least-armor.unidentified: A small bright green circular crystal, faintly warm to the touch.

crystal-of-adaptation-lesser-armor.name: Crystal of Adaptation (Lesser)
crystal-of-adaptation-lesser-armor.description: This bright green, circular crystal is pleasantly warm to the touch. A crystal of adaptation protects you from hostile environments, both terrestrial and extraplanar. As an augment crystal slotted into armor, it layers spell-like protection whose power grows with the crystal's rank.
crystal-of-adaptation-lesser-armor.unidentified: A small bright green circular crystal, faintly warm to the touch.

crystal-of-adaptation-greater-armor.name: Crystal of Adaptation (Greater)
crystal-of-adaptation-greater-armor.description: This bright green, circular crystal is pleasantly warm to the touch. A crystal of adaptation protects you from hostile environments, both terrestrial and extraplanar. As an augment crystal slotted into armor, it layers spell-like protection whose power grows with the crystal's rank.
crystal-of-adaptation-greater-armor.unidentified: A small bright green circular crystal, faintly warm to the touch.

crystal-of-aquatic-action-least-armor.name: Crystal of Aquatic Action (Least)
crystal-of-aquatic-action-least-armor.description: This sea-green crystal always feels moist to the touch. A crystal of aquatic action aids the wearer while underwater. The least crystal negates armor check penalties on Swim checks; the lesser grants a swim speed of half the land speed (rounded down to the next 5 ft.); the greater grants freedom of movement underwater and lets the wearer breathe water as easily as air.
crystal-of-aquatic-action-least-armor.unidentified: A small sea-green gemstone, always slightly damp to the touch.

crystal-of-aquatic-action-lesser-armor.name: Crystal of Aquatic Action (Lesser)
crystal-of-aquatic-action-lesser-armor.description: This sea-green crystal always feels moist to the touch. A crystal of aquatic action aids the wearer while underwater. The least crystal negates armor check penalties on Swim checks; the lesser grants a swim speed of half the land speed (rounded down to the next 5 ft.); the greater grants freedom of movement underwater and lets the wearer breathe water as easily as air.
crystal-of-aquatic-action-lesser-armor.unidentified: A small sea-green gemstone, always slightly damp to the touch.

crystal-of-aquatic-action-greater-armor.name: Crystal of Aquatic Action (Greater)
crystal-of-aquatic-action-greater-armor.description: This sea-green crystal always feels moist to the touch. A crystal of aquatic action aids the wearer while underwater. The least crystal negates armor check penalties on Swim checks; the lesser grants a swim speed of half the land speed (rounded down to the next 5 ft.); the greater grants freedom of movement underwater and lets the wearer breathe water as easily as air.
crystal-of-aquatic-action-greater-armor.unidentified: A small sea-green gemstone, always slightly damp to the touch.

crystal-of-arrow-deflection-least-shield.name: Crystal of Arrow Deflection (Least)
crystal-of-arrow-deflection-least-shield.description: This blue sapphire is cut into a large cabochon. It contains a small flint arrowhead in its center. A crystal of arrow deflection protects you from ranged weapon attacks.
crystal-of-arrow-deflection-least-shield.unidentified: A blue sapphire cabochon with what appears to be a small dark inclusion at its center.

crystal-of-arrow-deflection-lesser-shiel.name: Crystal of Arrow Deflection (Lesser)
crystal-of-arrow-deflection-lesser-shiel.description: This blue sapphire is cut into a large cabochon. It contains a small flint arrowhead in its center. A crystal of arrow deflection protects you from ranged weapon attacks.
crystal-of-arrow-deflection-lesser-shiel.unidentified: A blue sapphire cabochon with what appears to be a small dark inclusion at its center.

crystal-of-arrow-deflection-greater-shie.name: Crystal of Arrow Deflection (Greater)
crystal-of-arrow-deflection-greater-shie.description: This blue sapphire is cut into a large cabochon. It contains a small flint arrowhead in its center. A crystal of arrow deflection protects you from ranged weapon attacks.
crystal-of-arrow-deflection-greater-shie.unidentified: A blue sapphire cabochon with what appears to be a small dark inclusion at its center.

crystal-of-bent-sight.name: Crystal of Bent Sight
crystal-of-bent-sight.description: This small crystal is affixed to a plate of polished silver. A crystal of bent sight offers a great boon to any who face creatures that have gaze attacks. When this augment crystal is attached to your shield, you can avert your eyes from a creature that has a gaze attack without suffering a miss chance on your attack rolls against that creature.
crystal-of-bent-sight.unidentified: A small crystal set in a polished silver plate worn on the shield.

crystal-of-glancing-blows-least-armor.name: Crystal of Glancing Blows (Least)
crystal-of-glancing-blows-least-armor.description: All the hues of the rainbow—and many more—shimmer and dance across the surface of this multifaceted crystal. A crystal of glancing blows causes your armor to turn aside grasping attacks. The least grants a +2 competence bonus on grapple checks to prevent a grapple from being initiated; lesser grants +5; greater grants +10. These bonuses apply only when defending against grapple initiation, not when initiating or escaping a grapple.
crystal-of-glancing-blows-least-armor.unidentified: A small multifaceted crystal whose surface shimmers with rainbow hues.

crystal-of-glancing-blows-lesser-armor.name: Crystal of Glancing Blows (Lesser)
crystal-of-glancing-blows-lesser-armor.description: All the hues of the rainbow—and many more—shimmer and dance across the surface of this multifaceted crystal. A crystal of glancing blows causes your armor to turn aside grasping attacks. The least grants a +2 competence bonus on grapple checks to prevent a grapple from being initiated; lesser grants +5; greater grants +10. These bonuses apply only when defending against grapple initiation, not when initiating or escaping a grapple.
crystal-of-glancing-blows-lesser-armor.unidentified: A small multifaceted crystal whose surface shimmers with rainbow hues.

crystal-of-glancing-blows-greater-armor.name: Crystal of Glancing Blows (Greater)
crystal-of-glancing-blows-greater-armor.description: All the hues of the rainbow—and many more—shimmer and dance across the surface of this multifaceted crystal. A crystal of glancing blows causes your armor to turn aside grasping attacks. The least grants a +2 competence bonus on grapple checks to prevent a grapple from being initiated; lesser grants +5; greater grants +10. These bonuses apply only when defending against grapple initiation, not when initiating or escaping a grapple.
crystal-of-glancing-blows-greater-armor.unidentified: A small multifaceted crystal whose surface shimmers with rainbow hues.

crystal-of-lifekeeping-least-armor.name: Crystal of Lifekeeping (Least)
crystal-of-lifekeeping-least-armor.description: This bright crystal gleams and sparkles in the light. A crystal of lifekeeping wards you against necromantic and death effects. The least grants a +1 competence bonus on saving throws against energy drain attacks, inflict spells, death spells, and death effects; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5 and additionally lets you reroll (as an immediate mental action) one failed save against those effects, once per day.
crystal-of-lifekeeping-least-armor.unidentified: A bright sparkling crystal that seems to hold its own light.

crystal-of-lifekeeping-lesser-armor.name: Crystal of Lifekeeping (Lesser)
crystal-of-lifekeeping-lesser-armor.description: This bright crystal gleams and sparkles in the light. A crystal of lifekeeping wards you against necromantic and death effects. The least grants a +1 competence bonus on saving throws against energy drain attacks, inflict spells, death spells, and death effects; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5 and additionally lets you reroll (as an immediate mental action) one failed save against those effects, once per day.
crystal-of-lifekeeping-lesser-armor.unidentified: A bright sparkling crystal that seems to hold its own light.

crystal-of-lifekeeping-greater-armor.name: Crystal of Lifekeeping (Greater)
crystal-of-lifekeeping-greater-armor.description: This bright crystal gleams and sparkles in the light. A crystal of lifekeeping wards you against necromantic and death effects. The least grants a +1 competence bonus on saving throws against energy drain attacks, inflict spells, death spells, and death effects; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5 and additionally lets you reroll (as an immediate mental action) one failed save against those effects, once per day.
crystal-of-lifekeeping-greater-armor.unidentified: A bright sparkling crystal that seems to hold its own light.

crystal-of-mind-cloaking-least-armor.name: Crystal of Mind Cloaking (Least)
crystal-of-mind-cloaking-least-armor.description: This crystal is black as a clouded night sky. A crystal of mind cloaking protects you against mental infiltration. The least grants a +1 competence bonus on saving throws against mind-affecting spells and abilities; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5 and additionally lets you reroll (as an immediate mental action) one failed save against a mind-affecting effect, once per day.
crystal-of-mind-cloaking-least-armor.unidentified: A pure-black crystal, like a fragment of a starless night sky.

crystal-of-mind-cloaking-lesser-armor.name: Crystal of Mind Cloaking (Lesser)
crystal-of-mind-cloaking-lesser-armor.description: This crystal is black as a clouded night sky. A crystal of mind cloaking protects you against mental infiltration. The least grants a +1 competence bonus on saving throws against mind-affecting spells and abilities; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5 and additionally lets you reroll (as an immediate mental action) one failed save against a mind-affecting effect, once per day.
crystal-of-mind-cloaking-lesser-armor.unidentified: A pure-black crystal, like a fragment of a starless night sky.

crystal-of-mind-cloaking-greater-armor.name: Crystal of Mind Cloaking (Greater)
crystal-of-mind-cloaking-greater-armor.description: This crystal is black as a clouded night sky. A crystal of mind cloaking protects you against mental infiltration. The least grants a +1 competence bonus on saving throws against mind-affecting spells and abilities; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5 and additionally lets you reroll (as an immediate mental action) one failed save against a mind-affecting effect, once per day.
crystal-of-mind-cloaking-greater-armor.unidentified: A pure-black crystal, like a fragment of a starless night sky.

crystal-of-screening-least-armor.name: Crystal of Screening (Least)
crystal-of-screening-least-armor.description: This smooth, deep blue crystal is warm to the touch. A crystal of screening enhances a suit of armor with force, enabling it to protect you against the attacks of incorporeal foes. The least imposes a -2 penalty on touch attacks made against you by incorporeal creatures; lesser imposes -5; greater -10.
crystal-of-screening-least-armor.unidentified: A smooth, deep blue crystal, faintly warm to the touch.

crystal-of-screening-lesser-armor.name: Crystal of Screening (Lesser)
crystal-of-screening-lesser-armor.description: This smooth, deep blue crystal is warm to the touch. A crystal of screening enhances a suit of armor with force, enabling it to protect you against the attacks of incorporeal foes. The least imposes a -2 penalty on touch attacks made against you by incorporeal creatures; lesser imposes -5; greater -10.
crystal-of-screening-lesser-armor.unidentified: A smooth, deep blue crystal, faintly warm to the touch.

crystal-of-screening-greater-armor.name: Crystal of Screening (Greater)
crystal-of-screening-greater-armor.description: This smooth, deep blue crystal is warm to the touch. A crystal of screening enhances a suit of armor with force, enabling it to protect you against the attacks of incorporeal foes. The least imposes a -2 penalty on touch attacks made against you by incorporeal creatures; lesser imposes -5; greater -10.
crystal-of-screening-greater-armor.unidentified: A smooth, deep blue crystal, faintly warm to the touch.

crystal-of-stamina-least-armor.name: Crystal of Stamina (Least)
crystal-of-stamina-least-armor.description: This dull red crystal pulses in time with your heartbeat. A crystal of stamina protects you from assaults against your physical health. The least grants a +1 competence bonus on saving throws against disease and poison; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5 and additionally lets you reroll (as an immediate mental action) one failed save against disease or poison, once per day.
crystal-of-stamina-least-armor.unidentified: A dull crimson crystal that pulses faintly, as if counting the wearer's heartbeats.

crystal-of-stamina-lesser-armor.name: Crystal of Stamina (Lesser)
crystal-of-stamina-lesser-armor.description: This dull red crystal pulses in time with your heartbeat. A crystal of stamina protects you from assaults against your physical health. The least grants a +1 competence bonus on saving throws against disease and poison; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5 and additionally lets you reroll (as an immediate mental action) one failed save against disease or poison, once per day.
crystal-of-stamina-lesser-armor.unidentified: A dull crimson crystal that pulses faintly, as if counting the wearer's heartbeats.

crystal-of-stamina-greater-armor.name: Crystal of Stamina (Greater)
crystal-of-stamina-greater-armor.description: This dull red crystal pulses in time with your heartbeat. A crystal of stamina protects you from assaults against your physical health. The least grants a +1 competence bonus on saving throws against disease and poison; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5 and additionally lets you reroll (as an immediate mental action) one failed save against disease or poison, once per day.
crystal-of-stamina-greater-armor.unidentified: A dull crimson crystal that pulses faintly, as if counting the wearer's heartbeats.

iron-ward-diamond-least-armor.name: Iron Ward Diamond (Least)
iron-ward-diamond-least-armor.description: This dun and ecru diamond is incredibly durable. An iron ward diamond lends its toughness to armor, helping it absorb blows in combat. The least grants damage reduction 1/- (stacks with any other DR) until it has prevented 10 total points of damage, then goes inert until the following day; lesser grants DR 3/- (cap 30) and functions only on medium or heavy armor; greater grants DR 5/- (cap 50) and functions only on heavy armor.
iron-ward-diamond-least-armor.unidentified: A bright diamond mottled with dun and ecru tones, almost too durable to be cut.

iron-ward-diamond-lesser-armor.name: Iron Ward Diamond (Lesser)
iron-ward-diamond-lesser-armor.description: This dun and ecru diamond is incredibly durable. An iron ward diamond lends its toughness to armor, helping it absorb blows in combat. The least grants damage reduction 1/- (stacks with any other DR) until it has prevented 10 total points of damage, then goes inert until the following day; lesser grants DR 3/- (cap 30) and functions only on medium or heavy armor; greater grants DR 5/- (cap 50) and functions only on heavy armor.
iron-ward-diamond-lesser-armor.unidentified: A bright diamond mottled with dun and ecru tones, almost too durable to be cut.

iron-ward-diamond-greater-armor.name: Iron Ward Diamond (Greater)
iron-ward-diamond-greater-armor.description: This dun and ecru diamond is incredibly durable. An iron ward diamond lends its toughness to armor, helping it absorb blows in combat. The least grants damage reduction 1/- (stacks with any other DR) until it has prevented 10 total points of damage, then goes inert until the following day; lesser grants DR 3/- (cap 30) and functions only on medium or heavy armor; greater grants DR 5/- (cap 50) and functions only on heavy armor.
iron-ward-diamond-greater-armor.unidentified: A bright diamond mottled with dun and ecru tones, almost too durable to be cut.

restful-least.name: Restful Crystal
restful-least.description: This silver clasp is decorated with sparkling crystals shaped like stars. A restful crystal is a great boon to any warrior who must stay always at the ready. Sleeping in armor that has this augment crystal attached does not make you fatigued.
restful-least.unidentified: A sparkling silver clasp etched with crystalline motifs. Its actual purpose remains mysterious.

rubicund-frenzy-least-armor.name: Rubicund Frenzy (Least)
rubicund-frenzy-least-armor.description: This ruby is cut into a torus—beveled on top, flat below. It is meant to be attached to a suit of armor. A rubicund frenzy drinks your blood when you are wounded, whipping you into a savage frenzy. This item functions only for living creatures. The least crystal grants a +1 morale bonus on weapon damage rolls and saves against fear while the wearer's current HP is no greater than half full; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5.
rubicund-frenzy-least-armor.unidentified: A ruby torus (beveled on top, flat below) that feels faintly warm against the skin.

rubicund-frenzy-lesser-armor.name: Rubicund Frenzy (Lesser)
rubicund-frenzy-lesser-armor.description: This ruby is cut into a torus—beveled on top, flat below. It is meant to be attached to a suit of armor. A rubicund frenzy drinks your blood when you are wounded, whipping you into a savage frenzy. This item functions only for living creatures. The least crystal grants a +1 morale bonus on weapon damage rolls and saves against fear while the wearer's current HP is no greater than half full; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5.
rubicund-frenzy-lesser-armor.unidentified: A ruby torus (beveled on top, flat below) that feels faintly warm against the skin.

rubicund-frenzy-greater-armor.name: Rubicund Frenzy (Greater)
rubicund-frenzy-greater-armor.description: This ruby is cut into a torus—beveled on top, flat below. It is meant to be attached to a suit of armor. A rubicund frenzy drinks your blood when you are wounded, whipping you into a savage frenzy. This item functions only for living creatures. The least crystal grants a +1 morale bonus on weapon damage rolls and saves against fear while the wearer's current HP is no greater than half full; lesser grants +3; greater grants +5.
rubicund-frenzy-greater-armor.unidentified: A ruby torus (beveled on top, flat below) that feels faintly warm against the skin.
